pkgmetadata.longdescription: bagbagAn all in one python library Installbashpip3 install bagbag --upgrade Dockerbashdocker run --rm --name bagbag -v pathtofilerun.pyapprun.py darren2046bagbaglatest Library Crypto AES(keystr, modestrcfb) Encrypt(rawstr) -
